network_summary: Dr. Kamal Vibhakar (and Dr. Charu Vibhakar) are a dentist family practicing for 40+ years at 3902 Harlem Ave, Lyons IL under the DBA 'Alldent Dental Center' (legal entity: Vibhakar and Vibhakar D.D.S.P.C.). The second NPPES record in this AO cluster — Amerident Associates at 4008 W 26th St Chicago (ZIP 60623) — is marked CLOSED on Yelp (March 2026 update) and carries parent_company='1ST FAMILY DENTAL' with year_established=2024, a conflicting data picture. The actual 1st Family Dental Little Village location is at 4049 W 26th St (a different address). The Amerident Associates NPI appears to be a stale/closed record where Kamal Vibhakar remained as AO from a prior Vibhakar-operated Amerident satellite; the 1st Family Dental parent_company label in NPPES may reflect a brief affiliation or DSO classifier artifact. The AO cluster should NOT be read as Vibhakar co-owning a live 1st Family Dental branch. Location 2 should be flagged stale/closed. The Lyons Alldent location is an active single-family practice (two Vibhakar dentists, one address) — not a true multi-office expansion.
